title: Daoist Canon: Quanzhen Yulu (Records of Sayings) (Section 2)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Quanzhen Yulu (Records of Sayings)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Quanzhen Yulu (Records of Sayings)

translation.text: From the Quanzhen Yulu (Records of Sayings) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
